title: Whatfix End User
description: Schema representing a Whatfix end user tracked for digital adoption analytics and content segmentation.

userId.description: Unique identifier for the end user.

email.description: Email address of the end user.

name.description: Display name of the end user.

attributes.description: Custom key-value attributes used for segmentation (e.g., role, department, location, tier).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this user was first tracked by Whatfix.

lastSeenAt.description: Timestamp when this user was last active on a Whatfix-enabled page.
